glosses.ja: 配偶者; 夫または妻

translations.en: My spouse is working late today.
translations.es: Mi pareja trabaja hasta tarde hoy.
translations.it: Il mio partner oggi lavora fino a tardi.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的伴侣今天要加班到很晚。
translations.yue: 我伴侶今日要加班到好夜。
translations.pt: Meu parceiro trabalha até tarde hoje.
translations.he: בן הזוג שלי עובד עד מאוחר היום.
translations.tr: Eşim bugün geç saatlere kadar çalışıyor.
translations.vi: Người bạn đời của tôi hôm nay làm đến khuya.
translations.ar: شريك حياتي يعمل حتى وقت متأخر اليوم.
translations.nl: Mijn partner werkt vandaag tot laat.
translations.hi: मेरा जीवनसाथी आज देर तक काम कर रहा है.
translations.pl: Mój partner dziś pracuje do późna.
translations.el: Ο σύζυγός μου σήμερα δουλεύει μέχρι αργά.
translations.nb: Partneren min jobber sent i dag.
translations.id: Pasangan saya bekerja sampai larut hari ini.
translations.ro: Partenerul meu lucrează până târziu astăzi.
translations.cs: Můj partner dnes pracuje do noci.
translations.da: Min partner arbejder sent i dag.
translations.ja: 私のパートナーは今日は遅くまで働いています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; modifies 'Ehepartner'; nominative masculine singular agreeing with the subject.
Common noun; subject of the clause in nominative; refers to the speaker’s spouse.
Main verb; 3rd person singular present; predicates the action performed by the subject.
Temporal adverb; specifies the time of the action.
Comparative adverb; indicates increased duration of the action.

sentences.target: Sie wartet auf ihren Ehepartner vor dem Kino.
sentences.reading: /ziː ˈvaʁtət aʊ̯f ˈiːʁən ˈeːəˌpaʁtnɐ foːɐ̯ deːm ˈkiːno/

translations.de: Sie wartet auf ihren Ehepartner vor dem Kino.
translations.ipa: /ziː ˈvaʁtət aʊ̯f ˈiːʁən ˈeːəˌpaʁtnɐ foːɐ̯ deːm ˈkiːno/
translations.en: She is waiting for her spouse in front of the cinema.
translations.es: Ella está esperando a su pareja frente al cine.
translations.fr: Elle attend son conjoint devant le cinéma.
translations.it: Lei aspetta il suo partner davanti al cinema.
translations.ko: 그녀는 영화관 앞에서 배우자를 기다리고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 她在电影院门口等她的伴侣。
translations.yue: 佢喺戲院門口等緊佢嘅伴侶。
translations.ru: Она ждёт своего супруга у кинотеатра.
translations.pt: Ela está esperando o parceiro dela em frente ao cinema.
translations.he: היא מחכה לבן הזוג שלה מול הקולנוע.
translations.vi: Cô ấy đang đợi người bạn đời của mình trước rạp chiếu phim.
translations.ar: هي تنتظر شريك حياتها أمام السينما.
translations.nl: Ze wacht op haar partner voor de bioscoop.
translations.uk: Вона чекає на свого партнера перед кінотеатром.
translations.hu: A mozi előtt várja a párját.
translations.hi: वह सिनेमा के सामने अपने जीवनसाथी का इंतज़ार कर रही है.
translations.pl: Ona czeka na swojego partnera przed kinem.
translations.el: Περιμένει τον σύζυγό της έξω από τον κινηματογράφο.
translations.nb: Hun venter på partneren sin utenfor kinoen.
translations.id: Dia menunggu pasangannya di depan bioskop.
translations.sv: Hon väntar på sin partner utanför biografen.
translations.ro: Ea își așteaptă partenerul în fața cinematografului.
translations.cs: Čeká na svého partnera před kinem.
translations.da: Hun venter på sin partner foran biografen.
translations.ja: 彼女は映画館の前でパートナーを待っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 3rd person singular feminine; subject of the sentence.
Main verb; 3rd person singular present; selects a prepositional object with 'auf'.
Preposition; forms a prepositional object with accusative here (required by 'warten').
Possessive determiner; accusative masculine singular; modifies 'Ehepartner' within the 'auf'-PP.
Common noun; head of the prepositional object governed by 'auf'; accusative case.
Preposition; introduces a locative PP with dative.
Definite article; dative singular neuter; modifies 'Kino' in the 'vor'-PP.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'vor'; denotes the location.

sentences.target: Mein Ehepartner hilft mir beim Kochen.

translations.de: Mein Ehepartner hilft mir beim Kochen.
translations.en: My spouse helps me with cooking.
translations.es: Mi pareja me ayuda a cocinar.
translations.it: Il mio partner mi aiuta a cucinare.
translations.pt: Meu parceiro me ajuda a cozinhar.
translations.he: בן הזוג שלי עוזר לי לבשל.
translations.vi: Người bạn đời của tôi giúp tôi nấu ăn.
translations.nl: Mijn partner helpt me met koken.
translations.hi: मेरा जीवनसाथी मुझे खाना बनाने में मदद करता है.
translations.el: Ο σύζυγός μου με βοηθά στο μαγείρεμα.
translations.nb: Partneren min hjelper meg med å lage mat.
translations.sv: Min partner hjälper mig att laga mat.
translations.ro: Partenerul meu mă ajută la gătit.
translations.da: Min partner hjælper mig med at lave mad.
translations.ja: 私のパートナーは料理を手伝ってくれます。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; modifies 'Ehepartner'; nominative masculine singular matching the subject.
Common noun; subject in nominative; the person performing the action.
Main verb; 3rd person singular present; takes a dative indirect object ('mir').
Personal pronoun; 1st person singular dative; indirect object of 'hilft'.
Preposition (contraction of 'bei dem'); introduces a dative PP indicating context ('during/while').
Nominalized verb; object of 'beim'; dative singular neuter; denotes the activity.

sentences.target: Der Ehepartner von Anna ist krank.

translations.de: Der Ehepartner von Anna ist krank.
translations.es: El esposo de Anna está enfermo.
translations.it: Il marito di Anna è malato.
translations.pt: O marido da Anna está doente.
translations.el: Ο σύζυγος της Άννας είναι άρρωστος.
translations.ja: アンナの夫は病気です。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative masculine singular; modifies 'Ehepartner' as subject.
Common noun; subject of the clause in nominative.
Preposition; introduces a genitival relation via dative ('von Anna' = 'Anna’s').
Proper noun; complement of 'von'; dative case as required by the preposition.
Copular auxiliary; links the subject to the predicate adjective 'krank'.
Predicate adjective; subject complement describing the state of 'Ehepartner'.
